actual_scope: Direct postapproval filesystem mutations in disposable target scratch roots with a deterministic injected clock; this is not a real harness.
limitations: The helper is confined to ignored target scratch and is not committed.
The namespace lock covers cooperative fixture writers; the upgrade race deliberately bypasses it to test the digest guard.
This evaluates the documented current-skill protocol directly, not enforcement by a production harness.
No independent responder or critic ran because subagent workspace credits were exhausted.
